description: National e-Governance Division (NeGD) is a Government of India division under Digital India Corporation that supports and implements e-governance projects. Its website describes various government digital initiatives and links out to separate project domains such as DigiLocker, OpenForge, API Setu, and MeriPehchaan.
summary: negd.gov.in itself appears to be an informational website for the National e-Governance Division and does not expose developer integration surfaces on the negd.gov.in domain.
